pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.7.8 to 3.2.2 to align with Java 21 support and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline; upgrading is required to compile and run on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from 17 to 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17 APIs, failing to utilize Java 21 features or potentially causing compatibility issues with libraries expecting Java 21 bytecode.

Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17+ but specific features or baseline assumptions may rely on the java.version property being set to the target JDK version for correct dependency resolution and plugin behavior.
Spring Boot 3.x manages JUnit Jupiter versions internally; explicit declaration is redundant and potentially conflicting.
Older Lombok versions may have compatibility issues with newer Java compilers or Spring Boot 3.x annotation processing.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit mockito-core dependency and version property.
pom.xml.why_exists: Mockito is now managed by spring-boot-starter-test in Spring Boot 3.x; explicit declaration is redundant.

pom.xml.general_idea: Reorder dependencies and add comments for better readability.
Add comments to group dependencies logically.
Remove explicit finalName configuration from build plugin.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x defaults to the artifactId for the final name, making explicit configuration redundant.

src/main/java/pl/gry/lotto/infrastructur.general_idea: Updated the external API endpoint path to match the new microservice interface.
Added IllegalArgumentException to the catch block to handle invalid input errors from the HTTP client.
Replace deprecated HttpStatus-based status code checking with the new HttpStatusCode API introduced in Spring Framework 6.
src/main/java/pl/gry/lotto/infrastructur.why_exists: Spring Framework 6 (used in Spring Boot 3) deprecates or removes direct access to HttpStatus.Series via getStatusCode() returning HttpStatus; HttpStatusCode is the new standard interface for status code checks.

src/main/java/pl/gry/lotto/infrastructur.general_idea: Update client error check to use the new HttpStatusCode API method.
src/main/java/pl/gry/lotto/infrastructur.why_exists: Spring Framework 6 requires using HttpStatusCode methods like is4xxClientError() instead of comparing HttpStatus.Series.

src/main/java/pl/gry/lotto/infrastructur.general_idea: Remove unused static imports for HttpStatus.Series constants that are no longer used in the refactored code.
Add import for the new HttpStatusCode class required by the refactored status code checks.
Migrate validation annotations from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/pl/gry/lotto/infrastructur.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.validation does not exist' on JDK 21 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/pl/gry/lotto/infrastructur.general_idea: Migrate validation annotation import from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/pl/gry/lotto/infrastructur.why_exists: The javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; using it causes a compile-time 'package does not exist' error in Spring Boot 3 environments.

src/test/java/pl/gry/lotto/LottoApplicat.general_idea: Remove unused Testcontainers imports and static container field to clean up the test class.
Add static import for JUnit 5 Assertions to enable concise assertion usage.

src/test/java/pl/gry/lotto/domain/number.general_idea: Update the return type of findAllById to List to align with the Spring Data 3.x repository interface changes.
src/test/java/pl/gry/lotto/domain/number.why_exists: Spring Data 3.x (required for Spring Boot 3 / Java 21) changed the return type of Repository.findAllById from Iterable to List; keeping Iterable causes a compile error due to method signature mismatch.

src/test/java/pl/gry/lotto/domain/number.general_idea: Update the return type of the repository method to match the Spring Data JPA interface contract in Spring Boot 3.
src/test/java/pl/gry/lotto/domain/number.why_exists: Compile error: method return type 'Iterable<Ticket>' does not override the return type 'List<Ticket>' defined in the Spring Data CrudRepository interface (which changed from Iterable to List in Spring Data 3.x).

src/test/java/pl/gry/lotto/domain/result.general_idea: Update the return type of the repository method to match the Spring Data JPA interface contract in Spring Boot 3.
src/test/java/pl/gry/lotto/domain/result.why_exists: Spring Data JPA interfaces in Spring Boot 3 (backed by Spring Data Commons 3.x) changed the return type of `findAllById` from `Iterable<T>` to `List<T>`. Keeping `Iterable` causes a compile error because the implementing class does not match the interface signature.

src/test/java/pl/gry/lotto/domain/result.general_idea: Update the return type of the repository method to match the Spring Data JPA interface contract in Spring Boot 3.
src/test/java/pl/gry/lotto/domain/result.why_exists: Spring Data JPA interfaces in Spring Boot 3 (and recent versions) define `findAllById` to return `List<T>` instead of `Iterable<T>`. Implementing the interface with the old return type causes a compile error due to incompatible return types.

src/test/java/pl/gry/lotto/integration/f.general_idea: Update the mocked external service URL to match the new microservice endpoint structure.

src/test/java/pl/gry/lotto/integration/n.general_idea: Updated the remote endpoint URL in the integration test to match the new microservice path structure.
